recommendations.title: Looks That Kill
recommendations.overview: A teenager lives out the hilarious and often tragic consequences of being lethally attractive, until he meets a girl with a congenital defect.

recommendations.title: The Longest Ride
recommendations.overview: The lives of a young couple intertwine with a much older man as he reflects back on a lost love while he's trapped in an automobile crash.

recommendations.title: In His Shadow
recommendations.overview: After the death of their father, two half-brothers find themselves on opposite sides of an escalating conflict with tragic consequences.

recommendations.title: Happiness
recommendations.overview: The lives of several individuals intertwine as they go about their lives in their own unique ways, engaging in acts which society as a whole might find disturbing in a desperate search for human connection.

recommendations.title: The Hours
recommendations.overview: The story of three women searching for more potent, meaningful lives. Each is alive at a different time and place, all are linked by their yearnings and their fears. Their stories intertwine, and finally come together in a surprising, transcendent mo

recommendations.title: Poison Ivy: The New Seduction
recommendations.overview: A sinister seductress vows to destroy a suburban family.

recommendations.title: 21 Grams
recommendations.overview: Paul Rivers, an ailing mathematician lovelessly married to an English émigré; Christina Peck, an upper-middle-class suburban housewife and mother of two girls; and Jack Jordan, a born-again ex-con, are brought together by a terrible accident that cha

recommendations.title: Americana
recommendations.overview: When a rare Lakota Ghost Shirt falls into the black market in a small town in South Dakota, the lives of local outsiders and outcasts violently intertwine.

recommendations.title: Call Jane
recommendations.overview: A married woman with an unwanted pregnancy lives in a time in America where she can't get a legal abortion and works with a group of suburban women to find help.

recommendations.title: The Swimmer
recommendations.overview: A man spends a summer day swimming home via all the pools in his quiet suburban neighborhood.
